---
title: "LoRa RadioRocket"
description: "Feather M0 + LoRa telemetry system for mid-power model rocketry: trimmed-mean altitude calibration, launch/apogee detection, and 1 Hz ACK telemetry over 434 MHz."
date: "2025-05-09"
categories: [IoT, telemetry, LoRa, hardware, amateur radio, Arduino]
image: ../images/lora-radiorocket.jpg
---

## Overview

A ground-up rewrite of [N3VEM's RadioRocketV2](https://github.com/N3VEM/RadioRocketV2) for the Adafruit Feather M0 + RFM95 platform. The rocket sled reads barometric altitude and high-G acceleration, detects launch and apogee autonomously, and streams 1 Hz telemetry packets to a matching Feather M0 ground station over 434 MHz LoRa.

The rocket is a PiercerMini — a mid-power airframe with the electronics bay housing the sled.

## Hardware

### TX Sled (rocket)

| Component | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| Adafruit Feather M0 + RFM95 (434 MHz) | Microcontroller + LoRa radio |
| Adafruit BMP390 | Barometric pressure / altitude |
| Adafruit ADXL375 | High-G accelerometer (±200 g) |
| LiPo battery | Power |

### RX Ground Station

| Component | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| Adafruit Feather M0 + RFM95 (434 MHz) | LoRa receiver |
| Custom blue acrylic enclosure | Weatherproof housing |

## Firmware

Key features of the rewritten firmware:

- **Trimmed-mean baseline calibration** — discards outlier pressure readings at startup for a stable ground-level reference
- **Launch detection** — triggers on sustained high-G acceleration threshold
- **Apogee detection** — triggers on pressure reversal after ascent
- **1 Hz telemetry with ACK** — ground station acknowledges each packet; rocket retransmits on timeout

## Build Photos

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![TX sled — Feather M0 + BMP390 + ADXL375 in 3D-printed bracket](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/velezf/lora-rocket-telemetry/main/RocketLoRaTelemetry/Feather9x_TX/Tx_Sled/Sled.jpeg)

![Electronics bay](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/velezf/lora-rocket-telemetry/main/RocketLoRaTelemetry/Feather9x_TX/Tx_Sled/Ebay.jpeg)

![PiercerMini — Radio Rocket Edition](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/velezf/lora-rocket-telemetry/main/RocketLoRaTelemetry/Feather9x_TX/Tx_Sled/Rocket.jpeg)

![Ground station interior — Feather M0 + RTL-SDR](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/velezf/lora-rocket-telemetry/main/RocketLoRaTelemetry/Feather9x_RX/Rx_BaseStation/Basestationtop.jpeg)
:::

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Ground station rear panel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/velezf/lora-rocket-telemetry/main/RocketLoRaTelemetry/Feather9x_RX/Rx_BaseStation/Basestationrear.jpeg)

![At the range](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/velezf/lora-rocket-telemetry/main/RocketLoRaTelemetry/Feather9x_RX/Rx_BaseStation/RangeSetup.jpeg)
:::

## Status

✅ *Phase 1 complete — firmware tested, repo cleaned up, build documented.*

## Links

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/velezf/lora-rocket-telemetry)
- [TX Firmware](https://github.com/velezf/lora-rocket-telemetry/tree/main/RocketLoRaTelemetry/Feather9x_TX)
- [RX Firmware](https://github.com/velezf/lora-rocket-telemetry/tree/main/RocketLoRaTelemetry/Feather9x_RX)
